name: Individual Carrot-Pork Loaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Micro-cook carrot, onion and 1 tablespoon water, covered, on 100% power for about 1 minute or until tender; drain.
2. Stir in egg yolk, bread crumbs, 1/8 teaspoon salt, a dash of freshly ground pepper, and oregano.
3. Add pork; mix well.
4. Shape into an individual loaf. Place in a shallow baking dish.
5. Micro-cook, loosely covered, on 100% power for about 3 minutes or until no longer pink, rotating the dish a quarter-turn and draining off fat every minute.
6. Sprinkle with cheese.
7. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 30 to 45 seconds or until cheese is melted.
